body.title: scan_ebooks + calibre_catalog — use paths().ebooks_root / calibre_library instead of hardcoded onedrive path
body.result: Shipped in f996b30b. scan_ebooks CALIBRE_DB + EBOOKS_ROOT now via paths() — single source of truth, EBOOKS_ROOT / CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH env overrides honored. calibre_catalog fallback removed; paths() is the only path. Import smoke clean.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 6 (SHIP). scan_ebooks.py hardcoded /home/akien/.TheIgors/akien/onedrive/... for CALIBRE_DB and EBOOKS_ROOT even though paths().ebooks_root + paths().calibre_library already provide the abstraction (with EBOOKS_ROOT / CALIBRE_LIBRARY_PATH overrides). calibre_catalog.py already used paths() but kept the hardcoded path as a fallback. Both fixed: single source of truth via paths(); no fallbacks to hostname-specific strings.

**Affected files:** lab/tools/scan_ebooks.py, lab/claudecode/calibre_catalog.py.
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: path-plumbing). **Scope boundary:** IN — constant replacement. OUT — logic changes; .db path abstraction changes.
**Test plan:** python import smoke — scan_ebooks resolves CALIBRE_DB and EBOOKS_ROOT through paths(); calibre_catalog imports cleanly.
